functions.cannot_absorb_reason: Medical publication quality and readiness require MAS domain judgment.
OPL can transport reviewer work but cannot issue medical reviewer verdicts.
Artifact mutation changes submission-facing medical deliverables.
Memory body and accept/reject decisions remain domain-owned.

Only MAS can sign domain receipt, blocker, and safe action authority.
Domain helper code encodes medical research semantics rather than generic runtime shell.
